extraction.one_line_summary: CORT NIELSEN Magnus won from 8-rider breakaway, controlling final km from the front position with Astana teamwork neutralizing attacks.
tactical_patterns: Astana placed two riders (Cort Nielsen, Valgren) in 8-rider break, allowing control without pulling until final kilometer.
Cort Nielsen led from 1km out in narrow street, forcing rivals to accelerate first on velodrome-style finish.
Sky completely surrendered stage to breakaway, nursing Thomas/Froome over 12 minutes behind despite approaching Pyrenees rest day.

rider_signals.CORT NIELSEN Magnus: positive: Won from front with confidence in narrow finish, listening for attacks rather than reacting visually
rider_signals.VALGREN Michael: positive: Fourth place after supporting teammate, Astana duo controlled 8-rider group without dominating pace
rider_signals.CALMEJANE Lilian: negative: Local rider finished only 7th in 8-rider break despite hometown advantage in Carcassonne
